---
title: "oas"
generated: true
description: "Oracle-Approximating-Shrinkage covariance (Chen et al. 2010)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.connectivity`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:oas -->
```python
oas(X: Float[Array, 'n p'], *, assume_centered: bool = False) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'p p'], Float[Array, '']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:oas -->
Oracle-Approximating-Shrinkage covariance (Chen et al. 2010).

Returns `(cov, shrinkage)`.  Same convex blend as Ledoit-Wolf, a
different closed-form `alpha`.  Matches `sklearn.covariance.oas`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:oas -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `X` | `Float` | `n` × `p` | — | — |
| `assume_centered` | `bool` | — | `False` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'p p'], Float[Array, '']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:oas -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
